## Pre-Review Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines.
- [ ] My code passes all tests (`npm run test`).
- [ ] My code is properly linted and typed (`npm run typecheck`).
- [ ] I have added adequate tests for my changes.
- [ ] I have signed off my commits per the [DCO](../DCO.md) (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new secrets, credentials, or API keys into the codebase.
